title: Tris Buffered Saline (TBS) Preparation
author: Neilier Junior
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfynjpve

steps.instruction: pH 7.4 10 mM Tris 150 mM NaCl Prepare 1 L, of TBS by dissolving 1.21 g, Tris Base and 8.7 g, NaCl in 1 L, of distilled water .

substeps.instruction: 10 mM Tris 150 mM NaCl Prepare 1 L, of TBS by dissolving
g, NaCl in 1 L, of distilled water .

steps.instruction: Adjust pH before use. Tris has a pKa of 8.3. Hence, the buffering capacity at pH 7.4 is minimal compared to phosphate buffer (pKa = 7.21)
